author: doll-agent
content: Generalize ToArrow, ToArrowBool, ToPolars, ToPolarsBool from Array1<T>-only to any Array<T, D>. Both Arrow primitive arrays and Polars Series are inherently 1-D, so multi-dim inputs flatten via to_vec_flat() in row-major order. Reverse path stays Array1; callers reshape. Add 6 tests (3 each side) for Array2 and ArrayD inputs producing correctly-sized 1-D outputs.
